definition: I2S populates its substitution dictionary with constants from all K arms of a multi-way switch simultaneously; uniform draws across the full dictionary lock the corpus into whichever competing arm gains residency first, crowding out the specific target arm.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S populates a large dictionary with all Ragel switch case constants; uniform draws from this dictionary lock vpc's corpus into whichever sister arm (3 or 5) gains residency first, crowding out the case-9 target arm.
signature.one_line: I2S dictionary roulette across K switch arms crowds out target arm

analysis.summary_one_line: Input bytes driving the Myanmar Ragel state machine to a transition action whose trans_actions[_trans] dispatches to case 9 (te=p;p--; non_myanmar_cluster).

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A byte sequence that, when fed into the Myanmar syllable Ragel machine (a switch dispatcher over _myanmar_syllable_machine_trans_actions[_trans] with arms case 3/5/6/4/8/7/9), drives the state machine into a transition whose action index is exactly 9. The winner seeds carry a recurring multi-byte signature (e.g., `00 ff 01 20 49 0c`, `20 4a 0c 00 00 00`, and a `|iahT|||||` byte run at offsets ~0x10-0x23) that maps onto myanmar_category values producing a trans_actions[_trans]==9 dispatch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile retains an independent CMP_MAP Hamming-distance bucket per case-arm comparison in the Ragel-generated switch and per-state transition comparison. Each input that reduces operand distance against the case-9 constant adds a new bucket, monotonically guiding the corpus toward case 9; resolved 10/10 in 0 unreached trials.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog logs ALL of the Ragel case constants and trans-key/targ/action literals into its input-to-state dictionary. The corresponding per-mutation substitution draws uniformly from this dictionary, locking the corpus into whichever sister arm (3 or 5 — visible as [B] hit in the source overlay at lines 506-512) establishes residency first. This pollutes vpc's queue away from the case-9 target arm: 0/10 resolved, all 10 trials block for an avg 11.95h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile wins via CMP_MAP gradient feedback on the Ragel state-machine CMPs: each input that produces a closer-matching operand pair adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus, giving per-arm Hamming-distance gradients that guide the search to case 9. value_profile_cmplog has the same CMP_MAP signal but is dominated by input-to-state dictionary roulette: the K-arm switch populates the I2S dictionary with K case constants and per-state-machine literals, and uniform per-mutation draws across that dictionary make hitting the case-9 target arm a roulette outcome that monocultures vpc's corpus into sister arms (cases 3 and 5 hit in [B] under L). The CMP_MAP gradient mechanism here is direction-asymmetric: against vp's gradient, the added I2S layer in vpc imposes dictionary-roulette overhead on top of a working gradient — pure loss. Attribution is to CMP_MAP gradient as the win mechanism; the loss mechanism in vpc is the same gradient being overridden by dictionary draws.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is case 9 of a switch dispatcher over _myanmar_syllable_machine_trans_actions[_trans], a Ragel state-machine action table.
Case 9 is the unique W-only arm; cases 3 and 5 are hit by both W and L (sister arms reached by both sides).
Case 9 lines (518-521) are [W] only — winner-resolving seeds take this arm; loser-blocking seeds never reach it.
At the case-9 branch site, W sees the true side fire (T=14 F=82) while L sees only the false side (T=0 F=160) — case 9 is L-blocked.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 518  T=14 F=82  T=0 F=160  case 9:  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile resolves 10/10 trials with 0 unreached, value_profile_cmplog resolves 0/10 with 10 blocked at avg 11.95h.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0
  avg duration blocked: winner=2.70h  loser=11.95h

evidence_trail.claim: The single technique difference between winner (value_profile) and loser (value_profile_cmplog) is I2S — vpc adds CmpLogObserver + I2SRandReplace on top of vp's CMP_MAP.
value_profile's mutators do NOT include I2SRandReplace — it relies on CMP_MAP gradient feedback only.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of vp's CMP_MAP, so the only technique it carries that vp lacks is I2S.
value_profile's feedback adds a new CMP_MAP-distance bucket per closer-matching operand pair, producing per-arm Hamming gradients that guide the corpus to case 9.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: Winner-resolving seeds carry a recurring multi-byte byte-pattern signature at consistent offsets (e.g., 0x14-0x1f) that the loser seeds entirely lack.
Loser seeds (e.g. the 'kezh-hant-mo' seed) carry locale-tag-like ASCII payloads that drive the state machine to non-case-9 arms (cases 3/5).
Winner seeds repeatedly carry the pattern `00 ff 01 20 49 0c` and the `|iahT|||||` byte run, a signature absent from L.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic K-arm switch over a multi-byte case constant (vp_gradient_derived_operand-style) where vp resolves and vpc also resolves at the same rate (>=8/10 each) when the case constants are added to vpc's I2S dictionary would refute the dictionary-roulette-trap claim. Equivalently: if a winning vpc seed's ancestor chain shows an I2S-floor row (dash row) at the case-9 substitution depth — meaning I2S actually substituted the case-9 constant into the input — vpc would resolve, not block.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff alone does not pin down WHICH input bytes flow through buffer->info to produce a myanmar_category sequence that lands on trans_actions[_trans]==9 — the Ragel-table indirection (info[p].myanmar_category() -> _keys/_inds -> trans_targs -> trans_actions) blocks straightforward dataflow inference, so the case-9 byte signature is inferred from W/L seed-set differences rather than proven by trace.
